src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Introduce Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for constructors and getters.
Remove dependency on Apache Commons Compress utility class which is no longer used or available.
Replace deprecated or external list utility with standard Java LinkedList.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Replaced Lists.newArrayList() with new LinkedList<>(args) and added java.util.LinkedList import.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Refactor class to remove interface implementation and adjust visibility modifiers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Removed implements IRedisServer and changed method visibilities (e.g., start to doStart, private to public).

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Rename methods to better reflect their purpose in the new architecture.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Renamed start() to doStart(), stop() to doStop(), and awaitRedisServerReady() to awaitRedisInstanceReady().

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Rename fields to improve code readability and consistency.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Renamed args to arguments and redisReadyPattern to redisInstanceReadyPattern.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Change constructor to accept a list of arguments instead of individual ports.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Replaced constructors taking int ports with AbstractRedisInstance(List<String> args).

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Remove the internal tracking of ports as it is no longer managed by this class.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Removed private final List<Integer> ports field and related logic.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.general_idea: Update log messages to reflect the new terminology (instance vs server).
src/main/java/redis/embedded/AbstractRed.human_impl: Changed log messages from 'redis server' to 'redis instance'.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.general_idea: Changed the return type of the ports method from List to Set to better represent unique port values.
Replaced the unused List import with a Set import to match the new return type.
Standardized indentation of interface method declarations to use 4 spaces.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with Java Stream API calls for cleaner iteration logic.
Utilize parallel streams for start/stop operations to potentially improve concurrency performance.
Change return type of port collection methods from List to Set to ensure uniqueness of port numbers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..human_impl: public Set<Integer> ports() { Set<Integer> ports = new LinkedHashSet<>(); ... }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..general_idea: Use LinkedHashSet to maintain insertion order while ensuring uniqueness in port collections.
Remove unused ArrayList import as it is replaced by LinkedHashSet.
Reorganize import statements to group standard library and project-specific imports.
Adjust code indentation to use 4 spaces consistently.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..human_impl: private final List<RedisSentinel> redisSentinels = new LinkedList<>();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.general_idea: Add @NoArgsConstructor annotation to replace explicit no-argument constructor or rely on Lombok generation.
Change sentinelPorts method parameter from Collection<Integer> to Set<Integer> to enforce uniqueness.
Change serverPorts method parameter from Collection<Integer> to Set<Integer> to enforce uniqueness.
Reorder fields and methods for better code organization or style compliance.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.human_impl: private final List<ReplicationGroup> groups = new LinkedList<>();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.general_idea: Update imports to reflect new types used in the class (Set, LinkedHashSet) and remove unused ones.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCliExe.general_idea: Add executable mappings for ARM64 architectures on Unix and macOS to support modern hardware.
Replace generic macOS executable constant with specific AMD64 constant to align with new architecture-specific naming.
Remove support for deprecated 32-bit architectures (x86) and legacy macOS x86 mappings.
Reorder class members to place the private constructor before the static factory method for better readability.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCliExe.human_impl: moved private RedisCliExecProvider() constructor above public static RedisCliExecProvider defaultProvider()

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Replace the implementation of IRedisClient interface with inheritance from AbstractRedisClientInstance to leverage shared base functionality.
Remove large blocks of commented-out legacy code that are no longer needed after the refactoring.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: Removed ~100 lines of commented-out process management and logging code.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Add a constructor to pass arguments to the new parent class.
Introduce a static builder factory method for cleaner instantiation.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.human_impl: public static RedisClientBuilder builder() { return new RedisClientBuilder(); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisClient.general_idea: Implement the required abstract method from the new parent class to define the ready pattern.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Inject RedisClient into RedisCluster to manage client lifecycle alongside servers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added private final RedisClient redisClient field and updated constructor to accept it.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Replace imperative for-loops with Java Stream API for isActive check.
Use parallel streams for starting and stopping Redis servers to improve concurrency.
Ensure the injected RedisClient is started when the cluster starts.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added redisClient.run() call inside the start() method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Rename servers() to nodes() to align with cluster terminology.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Renamed public List<RedisServer> servers() to public List<RedisServer> nodes().

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Rename serverPorts() to nodePorts() to align with cluster terminology.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Renamed public List<Integer> serverPorts() to public Set<Integer> nodePorts().

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Change ports() return type from List to Set to ensure uniqueness and order.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Changed return type to Set<Integer> and implementation to new LinkedHashSet<>(nodePorts()).

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Change nodePorts() return type from List to Set to ensure uniqueness.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Changed return type to Set<Integer> and used LinkedHashSet for accumulation.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Remove unused ArrayList import after refactoring to Set.
Add Set import required for new return types.
Add LinkedHashSet import required for new implementation.
Add Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and constructor generation.
Replace complex replication group and port provider logic with a simple set of node ports to support modern cluster configuration.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: private final Set<Integer> nodePorts = new LinkedHashSet<>();

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Introduce a client builder field and setter to allow configuration of the Redis client alongside the server.
Add a field and setter to configure the number of replicas for the Redis cluster.
Update the build method to construct and return a RedisCluster with both servers and a client.
Simplify server building to iterate over node ports and enable cluster mode for each server.
Implement a method to build the Redis client using the configured ports and replica settings.
Remove the old API methods for configuring replication groups and ephemeral servers which are no longer supported.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.general_idea: Replace the for-each loop iterating over Architecture values with a Java 8+ Stream API call for modern syntax.
Extract the repeated error message string into a local variable to avoid concatenation in both log and exception calls.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.human_impl: String msg = "No Redis executable found for " + osArch; log.warn(msg); throw new IllegalArgumentException(msg);

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.general_idea: Adjust code indentation to use 4 spaces instead of 2 spaces, likely due to IDE settings or style guide update.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.human_impl: Changed indentation from 2 spaces to 4 spaces for method bodies and blocks.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.general_idea: Reorganize import statements to group java.* imports together and add missing java.util.Arrays import.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisExecPr.human_impl: Moved java.io and java.util imports to the end and added import java.util.Arrays;

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Changed the superclass from AbstractRedisInstance to AbstractRedisServerInstance to align with a refactored inheritance hierarchy.
Simplified the constructor by delegating argument building to the new superclass, removing redundant local state initialization.
Removed public constructors that are no longer supported or necessary due to the change in the parent class contract.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.human_impl: Removed public RedisSentinel() and public RedisSentinel(int sentinelPort, int masterPort)

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Renamed the overridden method to match the new signature defined in the updated parent class.
Renamed the constant to match the new method name and improve clarity.
Removed unused imports resulting from the removal of local list initialization logic.
Removed debug logging statements that were previously used to print arguments during construction.
